title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 665
description: Utterance 665 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.
introduction: Utterance 665 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.

translation.text: Pyramid Text Utterance 665: an ancient Egyptian funerary spell from the walls of the Pyramid of Unas at Saqqara (~2350 BCE). These are the oldest religious texts in the world. The spells empowered the deceased pharaoh's ascent to join the gods among the imperishable stars. Utterance 665 continues the great cycle of resurrection spells.
